add_key.method: Diagnostic or saved immobiliser-data route after identifying the exact instrument cluster and keyed or KESSY configuration
add_key.programming_method: Volkswagen Immo IV / KESSY variant-specific Add Key procedure

obdstar_g3.summary: Volkswagen Immo IV key programming is available where the exact Tiguan cluster or KESSY variant is supported by the current device software.

vehicle_connection.display_text: Standard OBD on supported variants; a module-data route may be required on others

all_keys_lost.method: Acquire the required cluster or KESSY immobiliser data, prepare the correct dealer key and learn all keys
all_keys_lost.programming_method: Cluster or KESSY module-data route depending on the fitted system

obdstar_g3.summary: AKL may be available through a supported Volkswagen Immo IV dashboard or module-data route after exact hardware identification.

vehicle_connection.display_text: Supported dashboard or access-start module connection as required by the fitted system

warnings: Do not remove or read a module until its processor and memory family have been confirmed.
Back up and verify all data before dealer-key preparation or key learning.
All Keys Lost coverage is hardware-specific and must not be selected by vehicle year alone.

tiguan_5n_2007_2016.selection_note: Separate keyed and KESSY variants and identify the exact cluster or access-start system first.

add_key.method: Supported diagnostic, working-key or saved MQB immobiliser-data route after exact dashboard identification

obdstar_g3.summary: MQB key programming is available only when the fitted dashboard is a supported MQB48 5A or 5B type.

vehicle_connection.display_text: OBD or supported dashboard-data route depending on the fitted MQB dashboard

warnings: Identify MQB5A, MQB5B or MQB5C before proceeding.
The documented MQB48 solution does not establish MQB5C support.

autel_apb300.summary: Official Autel APB300 working-key Add Key coverage lists Volkswagen Tiguan 2018-2021 only.

vehicle_connection.display_text: Open and read the original working key using APB300

tool_accessory_ids: Supported Autel VW/Audi-style IKEY or key PCB
warnings: Coverage is Add Key only and does not establish All Keys Lost support.

Autel states no additional adapter is needed for the APB300 working-key data route.

all_keys_lost.method: Read supported MQB dashboard data, calculate the required security data, prepare the dealer key and learn all keys
